description: Designed and proposed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) AI matchmaking system for freelancer-job matching, including workflow design, cost estimation, and implementation timeline.
Architected an Agentic RAG recommendation pipeline using n8n, OpenAI embeddings, and PGVector, enabling semantic search-based freelancer ranking.

experience.role: Community Conservation, Data Visualization, and Mapping Extern
description: Selected as one of 100 participants worldwide for the National Geographic Society and The Nature Conservancy's Community Conservation, Data Visualization, and Mapping Externship.

Developed foundational GIS skills and highlighted key conservation insights, which helped secure seed funding for a local conservation initiative; chosen as one of the final presenters to showcase the work.
Maintained an average performance rating of 4.9/5 throughout the program.

projects.title: SGX Derivatives Data Pipeline Automation
projects.description: Developed a Python CLI tool to automatically download daily SGX derivative tick data and trade cancellation files. Implemented automated scheduling using systemd services with retry mechanisms and failure recovery, alongside structured logging and configurable execution to support debugging and historical backfills.

projects.title: Slime Mould Algorithm for Road Network Optimization
projects.description: Developed a slime mould-inspired simulation algorithm (Physarum polycephalum) to optimize urban road networks using attractor and non-attractor constraints. Integrated OpenStreetMap boundary data to constrain agent movement, and converted trails into a NetworkX graph with shortest-path refinement.

projects.title: Mangroves Conservation Chatbot
projects.description: Built an AI-powered chatbot using Cohere and FastAPI to answer mangrove conservation questions grounded on PDF-based knowledge sources extracted via PyMuPDF. Deployed as a REST API designed to deliver simplified, community-friendly responses with conversation history controls.
